title: Amazon halts Blue Jay robotics project after less than six months
description: Amazon said Blue Jay's core tech will be used for other robotics projects and the employees who worked on it were moved to other projects.

title: Mastodon, a decentralized alternative to X, plans to target creators with new features
description: Mastodon is looking to grow its open source, decentralized social network with new features aimed at creators.

title: Data breach at fintech giant Figure affects close to a million customers
description: The Figure data breach allowed hackers to steal customer names, dates of birth, physical addresses, phone numbers, and email addresses.

title: World Labs lands $1B, with $200M from Autodesk, to bring world models into 3D workflows
description: The partnership will see the two companies exploring how World Labs’ models can work alongside Autodesk’s tools, and vice versa, starting with a focus on entertainment use cases.

title: Google debuts $499 Pixel 10a
description: The smartphone is available for preorder now with shipments starting March 5.  It comes in Lavender, Berry, Fog, and Obsidian.

title: X continues to bet on vertical video with its latest update
description: X's new immersive video player is designed to offer a more mobile-friendly experience, optimized especially for portrait-oriented videos.

title: Snapchat+ tops 25M subscribers, driving company’s direct revenue ARR to $1B
description: The revenue milestone comes as Snap has added additional paid offerings outside of its core Snapchat+ subscription over the past year to diversify its revenue streams.

title: Kana emerges from stealth with $15M to build flexible AI agents for marketers
Microsoft says Office bug exposed customers’ confidential emails to Copilot AI
description: Microsoft said the bug meant that its Copilot AI chatbot was reading and summarizing paying customers' confidential emails, bypassing data-protection policies.

title: OpenAI pushes into higher education as India seeks to scale AI skills
description: OpenAI says its India education partnerships aim to reach more than 100,000 students, faculty, and staff over the next year.

title: Canva gets to $4B in revenue as LLM referral traffic rises
description: The creative company's monthly active users increased 20%, growth that was partially propelled by adoption of its AI tools.

title: India’s Sarvam wants to bring its AI models to feature phones, cars and smart glasses
description: The company is using edge models that take up only megabytes of space, can run on most phones with existing processors, and can work offline.

title: Heron Power raises $140M to ramp production of grid-altering tech
description: Tesla alumni Drew Baglino raises a large round to build a giga-scale factory, this time at his own startup.

title: Indian AI lab Sarvam’s new models are a major bet on the viability of open source AI
description: The new lineup includes 30-billion- and 105-billion-parameter models; a text-to-speech model; a speech-to-text model; and a vision model to parse documents.

title: DG Matrix raises $60M to make data center power smarter
description: The startup is making solid-state transformers capable of intelligently aggregating power from a number of different sources before sending it to data center racks.

title: US court bars OpenAI from using ‘Cameo’
description: OpenAI has renamed its feature in Sora from "Cameo" to "Characters."

title: Google’s AI music maker is coming to the Gemini app
Google Pixel 10A preorders come with a $100 gift card
